notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Luis Castillo on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Catcher Cal Raleigh picks off Brayan Rocchio at 1st on throw to first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry flies out to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.label: Austin Hedges pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges pops out to shortstop Colt Emerson.

notableEvents.label: J.P. Crawford GIDP
notableEvents.detail: J.P. Crawford grounds into a double play, catcher Patrick Bailey to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. J.P. Crawford out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Cal Raleigh to 3rd. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Cal Raleigh to 3rd. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.
